vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

mohawk.name: mohawk
mohawk.description: You have something old on your head that's standing up. What is this thing? An awesome mohawk. You've had it so long it's looking pretty old... but still awesome.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

righteousness.name: righteousness
righteousness.description: The horns on the king give him an ego. Which in turn gives him a sense of righteousness. He shouldn't act all righteous like that, but I suppose it's what kings do. If you had horns and a big ego, you'd probably think you were the epitome of righteousness too.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

simultaneous.name: simultaneous
simultaneous.description: If you're writing while looking at the moon, you can bet someone else is doing it too. People have a habit of looking at the moon simultaneously.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

half.name: half
half.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means half.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

number.name: number
number.description: This radical is the same as the kanji, but "number in a series" is too long. Let's shorten it to number.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

angle.name: angle
angle.description: When you're in prison, your only task is to count every angle in your cell. You count the angles of the walls and ceiling over and over again to pass the time. How many angles could there be in a room with four walls? Picture it and try to count those angles now.

feeling.name: feeling
feeling.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means feeling.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

crab.name: crab
crab.description: This looks like the shellfish radical, but a little different. It's the mighty crab! See the eyes and raised pincers at the top, the segmented belly in the middle, and the legs bunched up at the bottom? It takes some imagination, but this spiky shellfish definitely looks like a crab.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

someone.name: someone
someone.description: You find a coffin on the sun. It's burnt to a crisp from the heat, but there's definitely someone in there. You wonder who this mysterious someone might have been. Whoever they were, they got a fancy sun burial, so they really must've been someone (or shall we say, sun-one?).

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

criminal.name: criminal
criminal.description: You think you see some legs behind those bars. Who gets put behind bars? Only criminals. This criminal is pretty tall, since you only see his legs behind there.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

early.name: early
early.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means early.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

creeper.name: creeper
creeper.description: Someone's lying on the ground with his mouth open hoping to swallow up passers-by. This guy's a weirdo — a real creeper.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

beforehand.name: beforehand
beforehand.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means beforehand.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

death.name: death
death.description: There's a lid on a lion. And you're stuck under the lid with the lion, which means you will surely meet your death. Or if you don't want to die, think of the poor lion. If you leave a lion under a lid for too long, death will come for it too. Either way, somebody's gonna die today.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

scarecrow.name: scarecrow
scarecrow.description: A creeper in a rice paddy? That's just a scarecrow!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

shrimp.name: shrimp
shrimp.description: This radical has a little head, a curved abdomen, and some long, spindly antennae sticking out from its nose. There's no mistaking it — this little guy is a shrimp!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

products.name: products
products.description: You see three squares stacked neatly together. On closer inspection, you realize these are boxed products waiting to be shipped out.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

coat-rack.name: coat-rack
coat-rack.description: See all the arms sticking out of this radical? Those are for hanging lots of coats and things on, because this is a coat rack. Kind of a weird coat rack, but definitely a coat rack.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

public.name: public
public.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means public.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

pool.name: pool
pool.description: What do you call a prison for drops of water? A pool! The water may not like being in there, but the rest of us sure appreciate it on a hot summer day.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

past.name: past
past.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means past.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

saw.name: saw
saw.description: You're constructing a table. On the table is a drop of blood, which is your blood. This is from cutting yourself on the saw that you're using to make the table. Imagine yourself cutting yourself with the saw by accident. Ouch!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

zombie.name: zombie
zombie.description: This radical has a figure reaching out both hands at you with some dirt on his head. This is a zombie, and he must have just recently dug himself out of the grave by the looks of it.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

spicy.name: spicy
spicy.description: This is the spicy radical. See how it's wide at the top, with a little stem sticking up, and narrow at the bottom? Just like a chili pepper. It's so spicy it can't even handle its own heat!

comfort.name: comfort
comfort.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means comfort.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

poem.name: poem
poem.description: The flowery paragraph isn't just regular writing. It's flowery, which makes it a poem.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

mask.name: mask
mask.description: This looks kind of like a mask, right? It has horns, it has crazy eyes, and it has a big mouth. Nobody would actually look like this, which is why this is just a mask.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

gambler.name: gambler
gambler.description: The gambler holds a cross as he plays blackjack. He stands on his two legs expectantly, hoping he hits the big one. He just put all his money down. If he doesn't win this one the gambler loses everything, including the two legs he's standing on.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

guard.name: guard
guard.description: This radical is made up of horns and older brother. But those aren't really horns, they're a part of your older brother's new guard uniform. He's a guard now, of a bank or a museum. You don't know which, but you know he stands around a lot in his uniform now.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

happiness.name: happiness
happiness.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means happiness. Don't get it confused with the spicy radical 辛, they're very similar!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

noon.name: noon
noon.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means noon.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

conflict.name: conflict
conflict.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means conflict.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

flood.name: flood
flood.description: The three lines that make up the river radical are being pulled to one direction. It's a giant force of water going to the left. It's a flood! RUN!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

black-hole.name: black-hole
black-hole.description: When you shoot your gun at the sun, it becomes winter. The shot you fired sent the sun into a crazy chain reaction, making it implode in on itself and become a black hole. Imagine this happening and imagine the shock you'd feel. You shot the sun. You caused this infinite winter (and soon black hole death).

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

mona-lisa.name: mona-lisa
mona-lisa.description: This radical looks like a combination of the brush radical (聿) and the beauty kanji (美). So what's something beautiful you can paint with a brush? The most famous is probably the Mona Lisa.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

spear.name: spear
spear.description: Your mama is carrying some kind of elaborate weapon. You look closely and see that it's a spear. The pointy end is to the right, and there are some decorations hanging off it. It's a very fancy spear, and you wonder where your mama got it.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

next.name: next
next.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means next.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

blade.name: blade
blade.description: You have a sword that has a drop of something on it. That drop is a drop of blood. Sure, a sword will cut someone to spill some blood, but all you really need is any kind of blade to cut someone. Sword, knife, whatever, as long as it's a blade.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

peace.name: peace
peace.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means peace.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

bathtub.name: bathtub
bathtub.description: See the dude sitting inside the box? His head is sticking out the top. That's a bathtub he's sitting in.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

cheap.name: cheap
cheap.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means cheap.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

icicle.name: icicle
icicle.description: This ice is in the shape of a stick. It's an icicle!

dollar.name: dollar
dollar.description: This is a squiggle with two lines through it. Hmmm doesn't that seem familiar? It should, because it's the dollar symbol: $. Well, close enough. Just look at this and think, ah yes, a totally normal American dollar.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

allocate.name: allocate
allocate.description: You have some legs and you need to put them in the trash. But you'll get caught if you put them in one trash can. Quick, cut them up and allocate them to different trash cans around the city. Then you'll never get caught.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

football.name: football
football.description: Your friend is on the ground and you step on him with your cleat. There is no friendship here. This is a true sport you're playing. This is football.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

ability.name: ability
ability.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means ability.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

restaurant.name: restaurant
restaurant.description: You see a lid on the street with a drawing of a forehead and a mouth on it. Hmm strange. You pick the lid up and reveal... a secret, underground restaurant! The mouth + forehead combo was secret street restaurant code for, "There's good eats down in this here restaurant hole!"

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

leather.name: leather
leather.description: When I look at this radical, I see the body and (mainly) head of a bull. What are bulls made of? They're made of leather.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

vines.name: vines
vines.description: This radical is made up of two vines hanging down and a branch linking them together. Imagine swinging on these Tarzan style. AaaaAA aAA AAAaaaa!

demon.name: demon
demon.description: This is a demon. Can you see him? He has a crazy face and some tentacles holding something demonic. Try to figure out how to see a demon. But don't see him too good, cause then he'll come out of your computer and eat you.

morning.name: morning
morning.description: This is the left side of the kanji 朝, so we'll call it morning too.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

clothes.name: clothes
clothes.description: You just have to know what’s under these locked lids, so you kick them until they break open to reveal a whole bunch of… clothes. “Wow, free clothes!” you think, just as airport security arrive to take you away.

road.name: road
road.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means road.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

become.name: become
become.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means become.

stairs.name: stairs
stairs.description: This radical looks like a little flight of stairs, don't you think? Also note it's being held up by a pillar or beam or something on the left side. After all, you don't want your stairs collapsing as you walk up them.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

guest.name: guest
guest.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means guest.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

control.name: control
control.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means control.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

korea.name: korea
korea.description: There are five mouths eating cow at Korean BBQ. Korea is famous for their delicious BBQ, and you need a lot of people to eat all that beef. At least five people. (Get it? Five people!) That's why this radical is Korea.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

dawn.name: dawn
dawn.description: The sun is coming up out of the ground, making this radical dawn. Of course, don't confuse this with dusk! You can do that by thinking that the sun is an optimistic and bright thing, so it tends to come up, not go down. (Also, Japan is the Land of the Rising Sun. I mean come on!)

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

death-star.name: death-star
death-star.description: There is a hat covering the moon and it's holding a knife. Wait, that's no moon. It's a space station! It's the Death Star! It's pretending to be a moon under that hat. And it's armed! Don't let the Death Star stab your planet to death.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

nature.name: nature
nature.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means nature.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

capital.name: capital
capital.description: This looks like the kind of building you'd find in a Japanese capital. See the ornate roof and the stone foundation flaring out underneath, like a castle? The emperor lives in there. And wherever the emperor lives automatically becomes the capital city. That's why this radical is capital.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

friend.name: friend
friend.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means friend.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

wedding.name: wedding
wedding.description: This radical looks like someone wearing a giant dress who has a tear in their eye. This is a person at their wedding. That explains the big dress and the tear (of happiness!) in their eye.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

lifeguard.name: lifeguard
lifeguard.description: You have a task to save two kinds of lives. Who saves two kinds of lives? A lifeguard. They save the lives of people drowning, and then the lives of the people who go to try to help them. Picture a lifeguard saving the lives of two people at once. What a hero!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

greenhouse.name: greenhouse
greenhouse.description: Flowers need the sun to get big. To help them grow as big as possible, we put them in the greenhouse.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

mix.name: mix
mix.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means mix.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

mantis.name: mantis
mantis.description: This radical has slide, head, and insect in it. Which insect will slide your head off in a matter of seconds and then eat it? The fearsome praying mantis.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

both.name: both
both.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means both.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

bed.name: bed
bed.description: You'll have to complete the line on the right side in your mind, but see the rectangle bed and the pillows? This is totally a bed. That missing line is where you pulled back the covers when you got up this morning.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

announce.name: announce
announce.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means announce.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

accept.name: accept
accept.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means accept.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

warehouse.name: warehouse
warehouse.description: You put your hat on the ground and a flag in your mouth. You're letting the world know that they can use your mouth as a warehouse. Your gullet is open for storage business. Need to store some ice cream? Please use my mouth warehouse. ;D ;D ;D

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

comb.name: comb
comb.description: Look at all those little things sticking out. You could easily use it to comb your hair.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

chapter.name: chapter
chapter.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means chapter.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

ego.name: ego
ego.description: There's a drunkard holding out his fingers. He's staring at them. Realizing who he is. He's becoming aware of his ego. Now that he's aware of himself, he's probably going to get an inflated ego too. Yuck.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

ten-thousand.name: ten-thousand
ten-thousand.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means ten thousand.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

exit.name: exit
exit.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means exit.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

substitute.name: substitute
substitute.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means substitute.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

call.name: call
call.description: If you have a sword in your mouth you need to call upon someone to help! That thing should not be in there. Call someone over right now! Go ahead, call them! Let’s hope they can get that sword out of your mouth.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

peoples.name: peoples
peoples.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means peoples.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

change.name: change
change.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means change.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

farming.name: farming
farming.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means farming.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

rake.name: rake
rake.description: If you look at it, you can see it's a weird looking rake.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

surplus.name: surplus
surplus.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means surplus.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

barracks.name: barracks
barracks.description: You stick an umbrella with a big slide on it into the mountainside to make your barracks. You're going to use these barracks to teach soldiers how to slide slides and hide from bad weather. It's ingenious!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

giant.name: giant
giant.description: If you were to look at a giant from above, this is what you would see. Do you see the head and two arms? The giant is facing towards the right.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

specialty.name: specialty
specialty.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means specialty.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

odd.name: odd
odd.description: A big lip ring is a pretty odd thing to have. If it's big, it'll stretch your lip out, which is odd too.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

lovely.name: lovely
lovely.description: I don't know what this thing is, but it's lovely. It has two eyes, a funny mouth, and a scraggly beard. It's lovely, and nothing else, okay? So remember it that way.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

servant.name: servant
servant.description: Hey, it's that giant you learned before. But... but its arms are chained. They're chained because you caught the giant and now it's your servant!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

nose.name: nose
nose.description: If you look at this radical right, you'll see a NOSE (with a squinty eye on the left).

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

district.name: district
district.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means district.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

above.name: above
above.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means above.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

charcoal.name: charcoal
charcoal.description: When the sun gets small, you need to heat up by throwing some big horns in the fire. This turns into charcoal. Nice, toasty charcoal that keeps you warm when the sun gets small.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

blame.name: blame
blame.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means blame.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

lineage.name: lineage
lineage.description: A thread goes through the ground. It traces your lineage. You follow the thread all the way back through many generations, to find out your lineage involves Genghis Khan. Feel the thread and the dirt in your hand and actually trace the lineage.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

one-sided.name: one-sided
one-sided.description: This looks a bit like a waiter walking toward you with a platter in their hands... but wait. It's only half of a waiter. It's a one sided waiter!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

turtle-shell.name: turtle-shell
turtle-shell.description: Poor turtles. We don't like them here. This is a turtle shell. See the shell with just a tail remaining? It's the only thing we didn't remove off the turtle. It's just a shell with a tail, so basically it's just a turtle shell.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

pirate.name: pirate
pirate.description: This kind of looks like big (大), which I think you'll remember you learned by pretending this was a big guy. This big guy, however, has a funny leg... a peg leg. That makes him a pirate. Also, his arms are in the "YARRRR" position.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

hills.name: hills
hills.description: See the rolling hills with the road going off into the background to another hill? That's why this is the hills radical.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

north.name: north
north.description: You only have some ice and a stick for your spoon, because you're way up north. At the top of the world, there's only ice to eat, and — if you're lucky — a bit of stick for flavor. That's the north for you.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

rocket.name: rocket
rocket.description: See how there’s a lid on top of the treasure chest? That’s because the whole thing is a rocket which contains all the necessary items (treasures) to live in outer space. The bottom part of the radical shows you that this is a top secret project, though, so keep this private in your own head.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

library.name: library
library.description: There's a door over the bookcase. That makes this a library!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

bully.name: bully
bully.description: He's a creeper and he's Four-T (forty). If someone like this creeps on you, they're just a bully. When you get to forty you aren't supposed to creep on people anymore. You bully. You jerk.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

fang.name: fang
fang.description: Imagine this in your mouth. It's one tooth that sticks out more than any other. It's your fang. Can you see this sticking out of a wolf mouth instead? Try that if you can't picture yourself with a fang this cool.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

line-up.name: line-up
line-up.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means line up.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

oversee.name: oversee
oversee.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means oversee.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

guy.name: guy
guy.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means guy.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

cat-pirate.name: cat-pirate
cat-pirate.description: See the CP in this radical? It stands for Cat Pirate. Meoaarrrr.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

night.name: night
night.description: See that lid on top? It's actually a flying saucer. "Take me to your leader," say the aliens inside, arriving from a strange-looking moon. When do you think you'd see something like this? At night. When people see UFOs or the moon, it's usually night. That's why this is the night radical.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

spider.name: spider
spider.description: If you look closely and carefully, sometimes you can see some private legs in winter. Whose legs? Spider legs! It's too cold for them in winter, so they hide in cracks and crevices, but sometimes you can see their little leggies sticking out anyway.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

same.name: same
same.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means same.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

elf.name: elf
elf.description: You see a leaf ear, better known as an elf! Elves are just humans who have ears that are pointy like leaves.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

cottage.name: cottage
cottage.description: If you're wearing a hat and have dirt on your mouth, chances are you're staying in a cottage. That's because cottages are usually in the countryside, which means you're likely spending time out in the garden, with a hat on and dirt all over your mouth. You know, your average cottage experience. And hey, this radical even kind of looks like a cottage.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

certain.name: certain
certain.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means certain.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

interval.name: interval
interval.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means interval.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

wide.name: wide
wide.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means wide.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

syrup.name: syrup
syrup.description: The products trees make? That's syrup. Delicious maple syrup, for example. Mmmm!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

inside.name: inside
inside.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means inside.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

coral.name: coral
coral.description: In the water is a barb on the ground. It's coral. Coral may look pretty, but if you slip in the water and step on it, you're gonna get scratched up. That stuff is roooough.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

catapult.name: catapult
catapult.description: See the rock in the catapult? It even has little legs to hold it steady so it can catapult better.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

storehouse.name: storehouse
storehouse.description: Your flowers become your servants. You plant them, you water them, you bring them up, then you cut them down and put them in your storehouse. They do what you want because they become YOUR servants, not the other way around. That's why you can tell them to sit in the storehouse where they wait until you come to eat them.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

boot.name: boot
boot.description: There's something made of leather with some dirt on the bottom of it. It's a boot!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

member.name: member
member.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means member.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

claw.name: claw
claw.description: This looks like a claw of some kind already, making it quite easy!

belt.name: belt
belt.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means belt.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

slice.name: slice
slice.description: See the guy? See how he was CUT IN HALF??? That must have been one heckuva slice to do that to a person.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

turtle.name: turtle
turtle.description: There's a turtle shell inside this turtle radical. You can tell because there's a whole head and tail on this thing, making it a real turtle, not just a turtle shell.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

sake.name: sake
sake.description: This radical looks like a big, weird caterpillar bug thing. But, for the sake of everyone's sanity, we'll just call it sake, okay? Keep in mind, we mean sake as in "for the sake of X," not as in the alcoholic beverage!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

shuriken.name: shuriken
shuriken.description: See the shuriken stuck into the ground? In case you don't know, a shuriken is just a throwing star. Awesome ninjas use them. That's what's in this radical.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

commander.name: commander
commander.description: Who wears cleats and takes your measurements for so long that icicles start forming on your body? Your commander. The commander is very, very particular. And everyone knows the commander has to get everything exactly right. So taking your measurements takes SO long that icicles grow out of your nose. But that's okay. You have to impress your new commander, darn it!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

bright.name: bright
bright.description: The sun AND the moon are out? With both their light-powers combined, it's incredibly bright outside.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

departure.name: departure
departure.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means departure.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

valuable.name: valuable
valuable.description: There's a shellfish, but it's got some kind of fancy headgear. Is that… a crown, perhaps? It looks really valuable — and the shellfish wearing it must be even more valuable to be worthy of such a status symbol!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

sweet.name: sweet
sweet.description: This radical is the sun with its hair sticking out. Why is the sun's hair sticking out like this? It ate wayyy too many sweet things causing it to have too much energy, making its hair stand on end. It also kind of looks like a sweet, sweet candy with the wrapper sticking out. Remember it how you'd like.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

south.name: south
south.description: This is the radical for south. See how it's pointing south? You can think of the cross on top as a compass rose, and the arrow below (that ¥-looking part) as pointing down south. It's a compass pointing nowhere but south!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

omen.name: omen
omen.description: There's an explosion around your legs. It was just as the fortune teller warned. This is the omen she was talking about. Think about what happens after the omen hits. What horrible fortune teller magic will happen???

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

dance.name: dance
dance.description: You see a cow in the evening. You get closer and realize it's doing a dance. All cows dance in the evening. Can you picture it? The cow is dancing, so majestic, in the setting sunlight.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

prize.name: prize
prize.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means prize.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

skewer.name: skewer
skewer.description: There's a stick going through some juicy meat. This is a skewer.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

violence.name: violence
violence.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means violence.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

wrap.name: wrap
wrap.description: Yourself (oneself) is in prison. Look at the prison as it wraps around you. It wraps you up and holds you tight. That's why this is the wrap radical!

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

hot-pepper.name: hot-pepper
hot-pepper.description: You see something with a flag on it and put it in your mouth. It was spicy! You look at the little flag and it says... hot pepper.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

tooth.name: tooth
tooth.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means tooth.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

think.name: think
think.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means think.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

prefecture.name: prefecture
prefecture.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means prefecture.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

have.name: have
have.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means have.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

three.name: three
three.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means three.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

sky.name: sky
sky.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means sky.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

buddy.name: buddy
buddy.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means buddy.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

scroll.name: scroll
scroll.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means scroll.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

reality.name: reality
reality.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means reality.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

former.name: former
former.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means former.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

hill.name: hill
hill.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means hill.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

nurse.name: nurse
nurse.description: This radical is made up of blackjack and clothes with the six kanji on top. If you see six people playing blackjack and wearing the same clothes you should know that they're all nurses. Nurses play blackjack together to cool down between shifts and they usually don't have time to change out of their uniforms. That's why this radical is nurse.

signpost.name: signpost
signpost.description: This is a post with signs on it. And on top is a winter marker, showing that if you go north it's winter up there. The signs say things like "Narnia ↑" and "Meridell ←" and "Bananaland →" so you know it's a signpost.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

melon.name: melon
melon.description: This is a melon. Imagine a melon cut in half, and you're looking at its insides from the side. See those precious private melon parts? You're gonna keep those for yourself, because melons are delicious and not for sharing.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

cactus.name: cactus
cactus.description: See the cactus coming out of the ground? It's happy to see you!

shop.name: shop
shop.description: We already have a roof radical, so we're going to use the secondary kanji meaning for this radical. It's shop, remember?

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

satellite.name: satellite
satellite.description: Look at this radical. Can you see it floating in space? Can you see the antennae and reflectors? That's because it's a satellite.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

imperial.name: imperial
imperial.description: Stand up on the moon so you can look down on your countries. The thing with all the lines and borders are the borders of all the countries you rule, for you are an imperial.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

bone.name: bone
bone.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means bone.

plow.name: plow
plow.description: You're sliding some dirt around with a tree you cut down. This contraption you've made is called a plow. Use it to push dirt around!

badger.name: badger
badger.description: You know the animal radical. This is just like that with a little extra. It's an animal already... which means all you have to do is remember what kind of animal. In this case, it's a badger.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

wind.name: wind
wind.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means wind.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

can.name: can
can.description: It's kind of hard to see, but if you look at this the right way it looks like a food can. See the lid being pulled off in the top-left corner? And that horizontal line in the middle? That’s the can's label.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

dragon.name: dragon
dragon.description: A turtle that stands up isn't a turtle anymore. It's evolved into a monster. What kind of monster? A dragon! Rawwwr.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

house.name: house
house.description: Under this roof is a pig with her little ones. Your pig, because it's your house! You keep your piggies inside where it's nice and warm. They're all members of your family, so they deserve to live in your house too.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

again.name: again
again.description: What's under the lid on your cook pot? Legs and fins. Again. All you know how to cook is legs (of chicken) and fins, so you cook them again and again and again. You'll be having them for dinner tonight, and again tomorrow, and again the next day. Legs and fins, again and again and again, for the rest of your days.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

penguin.name: penguin
penguin.description: There are fins wrapped in a towel in winter. Who is drying these fish fins to eat them? A penguin.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

form.name: form
form.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means form.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

mysterious.name: mysterious
mysterious.description: What's under this lid that smells like poop? I don't know! How mysterious.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

times.name: times
times.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means times.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

height.name: height
height.description: You see a narwhal struggling with a measuring tape, trying to measure his height! His fins can't reach the end of the tape, but of course he wants to include his glorious tusk. Measuring height is not an easy tusk… er, task for a narwhal, but he'll figure it out. Probably.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

crab-trap.name: crab-trap
crab-trap.description: This radical looks like a small animal (匹) has a crab (其) sticking out of it. Often when a crab is eating a small animal, that small animal was put inside a crab trap to catch the crab, luring it in with the small animal. That's why this radical is crab trap.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

fat.name: fat
fat.description: This looks like the guy from the big radical, but he's got something extra on his belly. That's his exposed belly button, because he's a sumo wrestler now: big and fat. In sumo, more fat means more power, so imagine he's been training to get as strong and fat as possible.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

psychopath.name: psychopath
psychopath.description: Inside this guy's forehead you have a spoon and a bunch of hair, not to mention whatever that is in the top left. That's the mind of a psychopath right there.

name.description: This radical is the same as the kanji. It means name.

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

splinter.name: splinter
splinter.description: Although a little bit modified, there is a turtle shell that's on a mustache with this radical. The only thing with a mustache that hangs around turtles is Splinter, the giant rat from Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. So this radical is Splinter (the giant rat).

vietnamese.note: WaniKani-specific radical (no traditional bộ thủ equivalent)

frostbite.name: frostbite
frostbite.description: This radical is made of dirt, legs, and winter. If you have to bury your legs in the dirt in winter, it's probably because you got frostbite. You had to leave your dead legs behind. :(

courage.description: When a mama watches over a man, it gives him the courage he needs to take on any foe.
